sentenceText: 73%  of startups lose time on manual workflows.

sentenceText: Over $1.8 trillion wasted every year on inefficiency.

semanticIdeas.meaning: A significant number of entities or units are increasing their operational scale at an accelerating rate.
This acceleration occurs repeatedly on a quarterly time basis, implying continual and regular progress.

The process is cumulative and cyclical, offering strong potential for dynamic, time-based visual metaphors (e.g., multiplying graphs, expanding fields, time-lapse sequences). The main conceptual hierarchy is growth (primary) driven by temporal cycles (supporting), with emphasis on the magnitude and momentum. This is highly useful cinematically to communicate scale, speed, and acceleration.
